title: LJY 120 Pieces White Lace Round Paper Doilies Cake Packaging Pads Wedding Tableware Decoration (240mm)
features: Material: lace paper doilies are made from raw wood pulp, non-toxic and tasteless, thin but solid.
Special design: these paper doilies have an antique lace design in white color, cute and delicate, elegant addition to tables, turn occasions into a special celebration.
Great for birthdays, parties, weddings tray, plate, platter, table decorating, etc.

Wide Applications: cake mats, food pad, place on trays, under juice glasses, under butter, under flower vases, wrapping small gifts, wrap wedding invitations, card making, craft projects and scrapbook projects etc.
description: Wide application: These lace doilies can be applied to dress up a table display and decorate plate, cups, wedding tray, vases, platter, plate, gift bags, cards, etc. The doilies can be easily separated from each other, convenient to add more fancy and elegance to your art and craft projects. Fit for festive occasions like Christmas parties, Valentine's parties, weddings, anniversaries and other celebrations that needs extra elegance. Usage: to protect the table cloth. Protect table cloth from grease, stains and other attacks, especially for cotton tablecloth. Specifications: Material: raw wood pulp Color: white Diameter: 9.5 inch / 240 mm Package content: 120 x Round paper doilies
